page: Microsoft Azure E64-32ds_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the Edsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 16 physical cores, operating at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The processor includes a 260 MB L3 cache and supports Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX). The server is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing 16.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 3780 GB of local storage.

Benchmark results indicate strong performance in single-threaded gzip compression at 31.08 GB/sec and Geekbench single-core and multi-core tests, scoring 2110.0 and 16603.0 respectively. Static web serving throughput is also strong at 43.34 GB/sec. However, the Passmark memory score is relatively weak at 1572.37, and large-block memory write bandwidth is measured at 74.71 GB/sec. LLM inference benchmarks show average performance for medium models, but text generation for large 70B models is poor at 2.45 tokens/sec.

With a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 16 GB per core and bundled 3780 GB local storage, this server offers qualitative resource density suitable for memory-intensive workloads without requiring external storage attachments. It is well-suited for database operations, memory-cached applications, and large-scale data processing. The lack of a GPU and the poor performance in large-model LLM text generation make it less suitable for heavy AI training or complex deep learning inference, but it remains highly capable for enterprise database management and high-throughput web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure E64-32ds_v6 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server from the Edsv6 family, powered by a 32-vCPU Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz on Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding 16.0 GB per core, alongside 3780 GB of local storage. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and AMX. Performance benchmarks show strong results in single-threaded gzip compression (31.08 GB/sec), static web serving (43.34 GB/sec), and Geekbench multi-core execution (16603.0). Conversely, memory performance is mixed, with a weak Passmark memory score and poor large-model LLM text generation at 2.45 tokens/sec. This server is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy applications and local database workloads, though it is not designed for GPU-accelerated tasks or large-scale AI model inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64-32ds_v6 is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and database operations.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64-32ds_v6 is an Edsv6 server with 32 Intel vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 platform featuring high-capacity local storage and advanced matrix extensions for enterprise database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs operating at 4.2 GHz
512.0 GB of system memory providing 16.0 GB per core
3780 GB of bundled local storage for high-capacity data needs
Strong performance in static web serving and gzip compression
Optimized for enterprise databases, caching, and memory-heavy workloads
